name: elias_configure
description: Configure ELIAS server credentials at runtime — no static config files needed. Use action=set with baseUrl, username, and password to connect. Use action=status to inspect current config, action=clear to remove credentials.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: set = configure credentials; status = show current config; clear = remove session credentials

arguments.name: baseUrl
arguments.desc: ELIAS server URL, e.g. https://elias.example.com:22130/api (required for set)

arguments.name: username
arguments.desc: Username (required for set)

arguments.name: password
arguments.desc: Password (required for set)

arguments.name: domain
arguments.desc: Domain — leave empty if not required

arguments.name: ignoreTls
arguments.desc: Accept self-signed TLS certificates (default: false)

arguments.name: save
arguments.desc: Persist credentials to ~/.elias-mcp.json for future sessions (default: false)

arguments.name: test
arguments.desc: Test the connection before applying (default: true)

arguments.name: deleteSaved
arguments.desc: Also delete ~/.elias-mcp.json when clearing (default: false)

name: elias_containers
description: Manage ELIAS containers. action=list returns all containers. action=check validates a container by name. action=create creates a new container. action=rename renames an existing container. action=delete deletes a container.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: list = all containers; check = validate container; create/rename/delete = manage

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Container name (required for check, create, rename, delete)

arguments.name: newName
arguments.desc: New container name (required for rename)

name: elias_images
description: Manage ELIAS image definitions (IDF). Supports list, get, create, update, delete, sign, lock, and setdescription. Create/update automatically resolves package dependencies.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: CRUD operations on IDF images, plus sign, lock, and setdescription

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Image name without extension (required for get/create/update/delete/sign/lock/setdescription)

arguments.name: idf
arguments.desc: IDF definition object (required for create/update)

arguments.name: overwrite
arguments.desc: Overwrite existing image (default: false)

arguments.name: description
arguments.desc: Image description, max 64 chars, no newlines (required for setdescription)

name: elias_image_templates
description: Manage ELIAS image definition templates (IDT). Supports list, get, create, update, delete, sign, lock, and setdescription. Accepts epmGroups as group names or pinned EPM IDs.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: CRUD operations on IDT image templates, plus sign, lock, and setdescription

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Template name without extension (required for get/create/update/delete/sign/lock/setdescription)

arguments.name: idf
arguments.desc: IDT definition object (required for create/update). epmGroups accepts group names or exact EPM IDs.

arguments.name: overwrite
arguments.desc: Overwrite existing template (default: false)

arguments.name: description
arguments.desc: Template description, max 64 chars, no newlines (required for setdescription)

name: elias_packages
description: Manage ELIAS packages (EPM/FPM). List, delete, clean up unused packages, or find packages containing a specific file.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: list-epms = all EPMs; list-fpms = all FPMs; delete-epm = remove EPM; cleanup = remove unused packages; package-contains = find packages containing a file

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: epm
arguments.desc: EPM identifier (required for delete-epm)

arguments.name: filename
arguments.desc: Filename or regex to search for (required for package-contains)

arguments.name: confirm
arguments.desc: Must be true to execute cleanup (prevents accidental deletion)

name: elias_certificates
description: Manage ELIAS certificates. List, retrieve, or upload PEM certificates and signing certificates (.pfx/.pem) for a container.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: list = all certs; get = single cert; save = upload cert (PEM text); get-signing = container signing cert; save-signing = upload signing cert (base64 file content)

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: filename
arguments.desc: Certificate filename (required for get/save)

arguments.name: content
arguments.desc: PEM certificate content as text (required for save)

arguments.name: fileContentBase64
arguments.desc: Signing cert file content as base64 (required for save-signing; .pfx or .pem)

arguments.name: signingFilename
arguments.desc: Filename for the signing cert (required for save-signing)

arguments.name: password
arguments.desc: Password for the signing certificate (if encrypted)

name: elias_solve
description: Resolve and validate ELIAS image package dependencies. Solve a complete package set, check for conflicts, or verify self-containment.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: solve = find complete package set; has-conflicts = check for conflicts; find-conflicts = list conflicting packages; is-self-contained = check if image is self-contained

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: parcels
arguments.desc: List of package IDs to operate on

name: elias_export
description: Export ELIAS container or image data. Supports full container zip, image definitions as text (idf/idt/jidf), signatures, StickWizz format, and image zip bundles.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: container = export entire container as zip; idf/idt/jidf = export image as text; sig = export image signature; stw = StickWizz format; zip = full image zip

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Image name without extension (required for all except container)

arguments.name: stickWizzDescription
arguments.desc: Optional description shown in StickWizz (only for stw)

name: elias_import
description: Import data into an ELIAS container. Supports archive files (.zip/.cab/.udf/.cap/.bup) and image definition text (idf/idt/jidf). Async imports can be polled with check-status.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: zip = import archive file; idf/idt/jidf = import image text; check-status = poll async import status by importId

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name

arguments.name: filename
arguments.desc: Archive filename including extension (required for zip)

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Image name without extension (required for idf/idt/jidf)

arguments.name: content
arguments.desc: IDF/IDT/JIDF file content as text (required for idf/idt/jidf)

arguments.name: fileContentBase64
arguments.desc: Archive file content as base64 (required for zip)

arguments.name: force
arguments.desc: Overwrite existing files (default: false)

arguments.name: importId
arguments.desc: Import job UUID for check-status

name: elias_access_control
description: Manage ELIAS access controls (requires global admin rights). List, create, or delete access control entries.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: list = all access controls; set = add access control; delete = remove by ID

arguments.name: id
arguments.desc: Access control ID (required for delete)

arguments.name: accessControl
arguments.desc: Access control definition (required for set). Requires global admin rights.

name: elias_about
description: Get copyright and version information for an ELIAS container.

arguments.name: container
arguments.desc: Container name
